title: Metz, Grand Est — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Metz, Grand Est: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Metz is a city in Grand Est with a population of 117,000. A historic city at the confluence of three rivers, with a stunning Gothic cathedral and the striking Centre Pompidou-Metz.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
